description: The company has purchased a new piece of machinery and the accountant needs to add it to the fixed asset register.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the purchase invoice for the new machinery.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the invoice showing a cost of $50,000.

nodes.task_description: Create a new asset record in the fixed asset sub-ledger, including details like description, asset class, purchase date, and cost.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the new asset record.

nodes.task_description: Set up the depreciation schedule for the new asset according to company policy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sets up a 7-year straight-line depreciation schedule for the asset.
